items.name: Vanita Prakash Kandhari
items.review: Whenever I go to India, I make sure that I buy clothing from them. They have amazing varieties of clothing with excellent quality materials at a reasonable price. Another good thing about them is that I don't need to worry about any alterations as they take care of it and try to fix it on the spot. All of their staff and the owner are very helpful. Overall, they have an excellent customer service with best quality clothing.

items.name: Anamika Garg
items.review: Very good collection of dresses, kurtis, co-ords, gowns in beautiful prints and fabrics like muslin, gajji silk, cotton and more. They also do alterations for perfect fit. A must visit for buying ethnic festive wear for women.

items.name: Priyanka Patel
items.review: Best place for shopaholic females where we find all types of collection right from decent to party wear collection in reasonable rates. I can't stop myself from purchasing more and more dresses from there even if I go to purchase a single kurti. And yes, Sanjay sir is the best person who really takes care of customer requirements.

items.name: Kavya Salian
items.review: Awesome collection. For every occasion I purchase from here. Every time there is a new pattern with a new design. Staff are very polite. It is my favorite boutique.
